---
title: "⏱️ Timeline"
listing:
  # Collect all posts from the four main sections (English + any remaining content)
  contents: 
    - "projects/*.{qmd,md}"
    - "areas/*.{qmd,md}"
    - "resources/*.{qmd,md}"
    - "archives/*.{qmd,md}"
    - "!index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table        # 用 default 列表模式，最适合当时间线
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
page-layout: full
---

A chronological timeline of the latest updates across the whole site.
